prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为25075→22072→18162→16311→15971名，整体呈持续上升趋势（位次数字减小），近4年累计前移约9100名，年均前移约2275名；2025年基准约15971名，上升速度有所放缓；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021年54人、2022年52人、2023年43人、2024年48人、2025年48人；2026年计划43人，较2025年减少5人（缩招约10.4%），缩招将导致竞争略有加剧，位次可能进一步前移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名从2021年第50名持续上升至2026年第43名，排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力和认可度不断增强；近年声誉平稳，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音热度为较热（总排名第27），2023年曾达高热（当年第6），短视频平台关注度较高，对报考热度有正向推动作用；控制科学与工程获评A级（第五轮学科评估），是该校唯一A-及以上学科；船舶与海洋工程、水声工程、核工程与核技术等特色学科实力突出，与招生专业高度关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等哈工程优势相关专业社会热度持续偏高（2024年均为高热推荐/推荐）；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年增加约1.6万人（+3.6%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；哈尔滨工程大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，距广东省较远，属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移趋势、2026年物理类招生计划缩招约10.4%、软科排名稳步上升、相关专业社会热度偏高以及广东省考生规模扩大等因素，在2025年基准15971名基础上预计位次继续前移（更难进）；预测最低位次约14923名，区间14423–15423名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、信息安全）
- 电子信息类（含电子信息工程、通信工程、光电信息科学与工程）
- 自动化类（含自动化、电气工程及其自动化、人工智能等）。

- 海洋工程类（含船舶与海洋工程、港口航道与海岸工程、海洋机器人）
- 水声工程（含水声、电子水声、海洋信息）
- 软件工程（国家特软创新班）
- 核工程与核技术（含兴海领军班、钱学森班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:

- 能源动力类（含能源与动力工程、轮机工程）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约14923名，区间14423–15423名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间上限（<14423名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（计算机类、电子信息类、自动化类）；位次接近区间下限（>15423名）建议以三档为主，兼顾二档。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 25075 → 22072 → 18162 → 16311 → 15971, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 9100 positions over the past 4 years, averaging about 2275 positions per year; the 2025 baseline is approximately 15971, with a slowdown in the rate of increase; the university's enrollment plan in Guangdong for Physics Category was 54 in 2021, 52 in 2022, 43 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 48 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 43, a decrease of 5 from 2025 (a reduction of about 10.4%), which will lead to slightly intensified competition and a possible further advance in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, with its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking steadily rising from 50th in 2021 to 43rd in 2026, reflecting continuously enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition; recent reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin popularity is relatively high (ranked 27th overall), and it reached high popularity in 2023 (6th that year), with high attention on short video platforms, positively influencing application enthusiasm; Control Science and Engineering was rated A-level (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at the university; distinctive disciplines such as Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Underwater Acoustics Engineering, and Nuclear Engineering and Technology are outstanding and highly relevant to the enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and other related advantageous majors at Harbin Engineering University continue to have high social popularity (all were highly recommended/recommended in 2024); the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong in 2026 is about 456,000, an increase of about 16,000 from 2025 (+3.6%), intensifying competition due to the expanded examinee pool; Harbin Engineering University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Guangdong, making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the approximately 10.4% reduction in the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan, the steady rise in Soft Science rankings, the high social popularity of related majors, and the expansion of the examinee pool in Guangdong, based on the 2025 baseline of 15971, the ranking is expected to continue advancing (making admission more difficult); the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 14923, with a range of 14423–15423.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security)
- Electronic Information (including Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
- Automation (including Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Artificial Intelligence, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Ocean Engineering (including Naval Architecture and Ocean Engineering, Port Waterway and Coastal Engineering, Marine Robotics)
- Underwater Acoustics Engineering (including Underwater Acoustics, Electronic Underwater Acoustics, Marine Information)
- Software Engineering (National Special Software Innovation Class)
- Nuclear Engineering and Technology (including Xinghai Leading Class, Qian Xuesen Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Aerospace (including Aircraft Design and Engineering, Aircraft Power Engineering, Engineering Mechanics)
- Energy and Power (including Energy and Power Engineering, Marine Engineering)
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering
- Big Data Management and Application
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 14923, range 14423–15423. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as a safety; for rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<14423), focus on Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Electronic Information, Automation); for rankings near the lower limit (>15423), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors while considering Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 10864 → 8957 → 7319 → 8167 respectively. From 2022 to 2024, rankings consistently moved forward (ranking numbers decreased), while in 2025 there was a slight backward movement (ranking number increased). The baseline for 2025 is approximately 8167. The enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong Province was 8 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 3 in 2024, and 7 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 15, an increase of 8 compared to 2025 (an expansion of about 114.3%), which is a very large expansion and will significantly lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranked 43rd in the Soft Science Ranking, with a continuously rising ranking in recent years and enhanced recognition of comprehensive strength. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion incidents. It has high popularity on Douyin, which positively affects application enthusiasm. Control Science and Engineering is rated A, but the History Category majors (Law, English, Business Administration, Finance, etc.) have low relevance to its advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has high social popularity (recommended), English/Foreign Languages have moderate popularity (wait and see), Business Administration is clearly discouraged. In 2026, there will be approximately 326,200 History Category examinees in Guangdong, an increase of about 34,000 compared to 2025 (+11.6%), indicating a significant expansion in the examinee pool and intensified competition. Harbin Engineering University is located in Heilongjiang Province, far from Guangdong, and recruits across provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the slight backward movement in 2025 rankings, the large expansion of about 114% in the 2026 History Category enrollment plan, the increase of about 11.6% in Guangdong History Category examinees, and the low relevance of the university's science and engineering nature to its liberal arts majors, the ranking is expected to significantly move backward (easier to enter) based on the 2025 baseline of 8167. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 13798, with a range of 13298 to 14298.

If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range (<13298), focus on sprinting for the Law major. If the ranking is close to the lower limit of the range (>14298), it is recommended to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety.
